en: For the purpose of the tape, I was present.
DCIS Sean Lambert, DS Colin Butler and Mandy Carter.
You can't smoke in here, Mandy.
What about Sharon Stone? She smoked in her police interview. And she wasn't wearing any pants.
I always wear them. You never know when you might get run over by a tram or arrested.
Mandy, do you know why you're here?
What is it this time? Doing a job for the cash and not telling the social?
While billionaires fiddle their books to avoid paying tax.
Grievous bodily harm. And supplying cannabis.
What? I've done neither. Remember this?
Mrs Seneca at the chippery.
You know what he could do you for? Battery.
Not now, Colin. Do you recognise that woman?
Yeah, but she was a not job, she pushed me too far.
Have you not got a legal representative that's supposed to be here for you?
They said they'd send me a lawyer, but no one's turned up yet.
Look, let's just get on with it, shall we? Knowing you lot, you'll fit me up anyway.
Look, do yourself a favour, sweetheart, and get yourself a lawyer. A good one.
Yeah, DS Butler's got a good point.
Maybe we should just give him a few more minutes to get...
CLATTERING
Sorry I'm late.
For the purpose of the tape, the suspect's lawyer has just entered the room on an e-scooter.
You know those things are illegal on public highways? And pavements.
Of course I know, I'm a lawyer, aren't I?
Anyway, I'm not on the pavement, I'm inside the room.
Hello, I'm Mark, I'm your legal representative.
Move over, OJ, I've got my own fucking dream team.
Just say no comment to everything, like they do on the television.
What are the charges against my client?
Grievous bodily harm and supplying cannabis.
Bloody hell. I normally do parking.
Thanks for watching.
